name: BANK OF THE JAMES FINANCIAL GROUP INC
summary: PART I Item 1. Busine ss General Bank of the James Financial Group, Inc. (Financial or the Company) is a bank holding company headquartered in Lynchburg, Virginia. Financial was incorporated on October 3, 2003 to serve as the bank holding company for Bank of the James (the Bank or Bank of the James) and acquired all of the outstanding shares of the Bank in a statutory share exchange on a one-for-one basis effective January 1, 2004.
